/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  -Wl,-soname,libplasma_vibra_plugin.so -o ../bin/libplasma_vibra_plugin.so CMakeFiles/plasma_vibra_plugin.dir/plasma_vibra_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plasma_vibra_plugin.dir/plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plasma_vibra_plugin.dir/vibrabackend.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib64/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libKF6I18n.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
